title: Bloomberg EMSX Order
description: A trading order in the Bloomberg Execution Management System (EMSX) blotter representing an intent to buy or sell a financial instrument. Orders contain instrument details, quantity, pricing instructions, and lifecycle status, and may have one or more routes to brokers for execution.

sequenceNumber.description: EMSX order sequence number, the unique identifier for the order within the blotter

ticker.description: Bloomberg security ticker symbol identifying the instrument to trade

side.description: Order side indicating the direction of the trade

amount.description: Total order quantity in shares, contracts, or face value

orderType.description: Order type specifying pricing and execution behavior

limitPrice.description: Limit price for limit orders (LMT, STP_LMT, LOC)

stopPrice.description: Stop trigger price for stop orders (STP, STP_LMT)

timeInForce.description: Time in force instruction governing how long the order remains active

goodTillDate.description: Expiration date for GTD (Good Till Date) orders

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the order

filledAmount.description: Total quantity filled across all routes

averagePrice.description: Volume-weighted average fill price across all executions

assetClass.description: Asset class of the instrument being traded

exchange.description: Primary exchange or marketplace for the instrument

currency.description: Trading currency in ISO 4217 three-letter code

notes.description: Free-text notes attached to the order by the trader

traderName.description: Name of the trader who created the order

createdTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created

lastModifiedTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last modified

routes.description: Summary of routes associated with this order

customFields.description: Custom user-defined fields configured in the EMSX blotter

RouteSummary.description: Summary of a route associated with an order

averagePrice.description: Average fill price on this route
